tasks.label: Build: Debug
tasks.detail: 🔨 [profile.dev] opt-level=0, full DWARF, 256 codegen units — fastest compile. Use for active development and step-through debugging.

tasks.label: Build: Release
tasks.detail: 🔨 [profile.release] opt-level=3, LTO, stripped, panic=abort — balanced performance and size (~20 MB raw). Use for performance testing.

tasks.label: Build: Dist
tasks.detail: 🔨 [profile.dist] opt-level=z, fat LTO, stripped — maximum size reduction. Run 'Dist: Package Windows' afterward to apply UPX and produce the distributable ZIP.

tasks.label: Build: Check
tasks.detail: 🔨 Type-check and resolve all crates without producing a binary — much faster than a full build. Run this first to catch errors quickly.

tasks.label: ▶ Run: Debug — pick demo
tasks.detail: ▶️ Build (debug) then run a chosen showcase game. Picker lists all content/games/showcase/ entries.

tasks.label: ▶ Run: Release — pick demo
tasks.detail: ▶️ Build (release) then run a chosen showcase game. Slower to compile but runs at full performance.

tasks.label: ▶ Run: Debug (no rebuild)
tasks.detail: ▶️ Launch existing build/debug/lurek2d.exe instantly without recompiling — shows splash screen. Drag a game folder onto the window. Build once first.

tasks.label: ▶ Run: Release (no rebuild)
tasks.detail: ▶️ Launch existing build/release/lurek2d.exe instantly without recompiling — shows splash screen. Fastest drag-and-drop testing after a Release build.

tasks.label: Test: All
tasks.detail: 🧪 Full test suite: full Rust targets (including slow load/smoke) then Lua harness. Default test task (Ctrl+Shift+T).

tasks.label: Test: Rust
tasks.detail: 🧪 Fast Rust suite for dev loop (excludes slow load/smoke targets).

tasks.label: Test: Rust Full
tasks.detail: 🧪 Full Rust suite including slow load/smoke targets (for full validation).

tasks.label: Test: Lua
tasks.detail: 🧪 Run the Lua bindings harness (lurek.* API surface, headless, no window).

tasks.label: Test: Math
tasks.detail: 🧮 Run only math tests — Vec2, Mat3, Rect, distance, clamp, fast-math helpers.

tasks.label: Test: Physics
tasks.detail: ⚙️ Run only physics tests — bodies, world stepping, AABB collision.

tasks.label: Test: Graphics
tasks.detail: 🎨 Run only graphics tests — color, camera transforms, draw command processing.

tasks.label: Test: Audio
tasks.detail: 🎵 Run only audio tests — source loading and mixer state (no playback in CI).

tasks.label: Test: Input
tasks.detail: 🎮 Run only input tests — keyboard and mouse state machine.

tasks.label: Quality: Gate
tasks.detail: ✅ Full pre-push pipeline: format check → clippy (strict) → all tests. All three must pass before pushing.

tasks.label: Quality: Clippy
tasks.detail: 🔍 Run Clippy with -D warnings (strict CI mode). Zero warnings allowed.

tasks.label: Quality: Format Apply
tasks.detail: 📐 Auto-format all Rust source files with rustfmt.

tasks.label: Quality: Format Check
tasks.detail: 📐 Verify formatting without modifying files. Exits 1 if any file is unformatted.

tasks.label: Docs: Full Pipeline
tasks.detail: 📖 Run tools/gen_all_docs.py — regenerates ALL docs: API references, test catalog, coverage analytics, wiki cheatsheet.

tasks.label: Docs: Rust (browser)
tasks.detail: 📖 Generate rustdoc for lurek2d and open the HTML output in the browser.

tasks.label: Docs: Library API
tasks.detail: 📖 Regenerate docs/reports/lib-api.md from content/library/*/init.lua LDoc tags.

tasks.label: Docs: Validate Lua Stubs
tasks.detail: 📖 Verify logs/data/lua_api_data.json plus docs/api/lurek.lua and docs/api/library.lua still match fresh generator output.

tasks.label: Dist: Package Windows
tasks.detail: 📦 Build [profile.dist], UPX-compress (20 MB → ~5 MB), assemble dist/lurek2d-windows-x86_64/ and ZIP. Full pipeline.

tasks.label: Dist: Repackage (skip build)
tasks.detail: 📦 Re-run UPX compression and assemble the dist folder from an already-compiled binary. Fast iteration on packaging.

tasks.label: Dist: Install Windows
tasks.detail: 📦 Build release binary and install lurek.exe to %USERPROFILE%\bin. Run once — then use 'Run: Release (no rebuild)' or drag-and-drop games.

tasks.label: Dist: NSIS Installer
tasks.detail: 📦 Compile dist/lurek2d-<version>-setup.exe with NSIS (requires makensis on PATH). Run 'Dist: Package Windows' first.

tasks.label: Dist: Build Extension
tasks.detail: 🧩 Build and package the VS Code extension → extensions/vscode/lurek2d-toolkit-<version>.vsix.
tasks.command: cd extensions/vscode ; npm install --prefer-offline ; npm run package

tasks.label: Dist: Full Release
tasks.detail: 🚀 Full release pipeline: debug + release + dist builds, portable ZIP, NSIS installer, VS Code extension → dist/github-release/.

tasks.label: CAG: Validate
tasks.detail: 🤖 Validate all .github/ CAG files (agents, skills, prompts, instructions) for schema compliance.

inputs.description: Choose a showcase game to run
